/usr/bin/ar qc libcortexsdr.a CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/cortexsdr_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/encoders/text/WordEncoding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/encoders/text/CharacterEncoding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/encoders/text/SpecialCharEncoding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/encoders/numeric/NumberEncoding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/encoders/numeric/DateTimeEncoding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/encoders/numeric/GeoEncoding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/encoders/media/ImageEncoding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/encoders/media/AudioEncoding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/encoders/media/VideoEncoding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/encoders/adapters/SpecialCharEncodingAdapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/encoders/adapters/GeoEncodingAdapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/cortexSDR.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/rle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/ai_compression/core/AICompressor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/ai_compression/core/AIDecompressor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/ai_compression/core/ArchiveConstants.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/ai_compression/strategies/GzipStrategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/ai_compression/strategies/NumericalRLE.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/ai_compression/strategies/SDRIndexStorage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/ai_compression/strategies/MetadataSDRStrategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/ai_compression/strategies/AdaptiveSDRStrategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/ai_compression/streaming/StreamingCompressor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/ai_compression/parsers/GGUFModelParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/ai_compression/parsers/ONNXModelParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/ai_compression/utils/ModelConverter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/ai_compression/utils/sha256.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/ai_compression/api/c_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/ai_compression/onnx_proto/onnx.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/ai_compression/SparseInferenceEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cortexsdr.dir/src/SDRWindow.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcortexsdr.a
